276.reason: [After detecting a single '&', the lexer reports an error but does not retract the extra character read, causing the next token to be misaligned. The same issue occurs for single '|'.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [After detecting a single '&', the lexer reports an error but does not retract the extra character read, causing the next token to be misaligned. The same issue occurs for single '|'.]

287.reason: [After detecting a single '|', the lexer reports an error but fails to retract the extra character read, leading to incorrect parsing of subsequent tokens.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [After detecting a single '|', the lexer reports an error but fails to retract the extra character read, leading to incorrect parsing of subsequent tokens.]
